nasb.text: You shall speak all that I command you, and your brother Aaron shall speak to Pharaoh that he let the sons of Israel go out of his land.

esv.text: You shall speak all that I command you, and your brother Aaron shall tell Pharaoh to let the people of Israel go out of his land.

cnv.text: 我吩咐你的一切，你都要說；你哥哥亞倫要告訴法老，法老就讓以色列人離開他的地。

ccb.text: 你要把我吩咐你的话告诉你哥哥亚伦，由他要求法老让以色列人离开埃及。
